race.comment: EDITING (1) had been plying her trade in harder Sydney metro contests before the spell and should appreciate the drop back in company here. Tuned up for this with a recent Wyong trial and gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim. Can run a big race while fresh. HARD AS BROK (15) got the maiden out of the way at Ipswich before being tipped out for further time to furnish. Include from the low draw. FLAXLANDS (12) returned in fine fashion with a solid Gold Coast victory and only needs some luck from the wide draw to be featuring in the finish. The well-related ADRANOS (3) (half to G2 winner Tiamo Grace) has placed five of eight over this distance range and rarely puts in a poor one. A must for the multiples. VALENCIA ROC (5) best of the rest in a race with a stack of chances.
